mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate above 4.5% signals a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in housing starts and retail sales signals a strengthening demand environment, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production below 100 signals a weakening supply environment, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month increase in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that expands discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint decline in the unemployment rate and increase in payroll employment signals a strengthening labor market, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the consumer price index above 3% signals a strengthening demand environment, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in industrial production and GDP signals a strengthening supply environment, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
